name: E-5 inline suppression: trailing // rubric-disable-line <rule-id> -- <justification> suppresses the violation on that line
command: printf 'eval("x"); // rubric-disable-line no-eval -- migration cleanup\n' > in.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/inline-suppression.sh" --rule no-eval --in in.js 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && echo suppressed 1>&2
